rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1123 governs plan requirements for homeless camping properties. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b), homestead exemptions, or property tax appraisal, so no conflict exists.
quote: A plan submitted for approval under this subchapter must describe each of the following with respect to a proposed property:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
